hero.kicker: Single entry to the execution circuit
hero.lead: Transparent Price is a digital execution circuit for a grain transaction: trip, acceptance, quality, documents, money, dispute, and evidence in one process.

control.title: What the platform controls
control.text: After the price is agreed, the key items remain under control: trip, acceptance, documents, quality, and payment grounds.

money.title: Money
money.text: The settlement basis is visible before payment release.

documents.title: Documents
documents.text: SDIZ, EDI, transport documents, and acts are linked to deal events.

logistics.title: Logistics
logistics.text: Trip, driver, route, and checkpoints are in one circuit.

quality.title: Quality
quality.text: Acceptance and laboratory indicators are considered before final settlement.

process.title: How the deal works
process.text: At each stage it is clear what is confirmed, what requires action, and who owns the next step.

price.title: Price
price.text: Price, volume, basis, and quality tolerances are fixed before the trip.

deal.title: Deal
deal.text: Parties, lot, and execution terms are consolidated in one circuit.

trip.title: Trip
trip.text: Route, driver, vehicle, and checkpoints are assigned.

acceptance.title: Acceptance
acceptance.text: Weight, delivery fact, and discrepancies are recorded at the elevator.

documents.title: Documents
documents.text: Documents are reconciled with execution events.

settlement.title: Settlement
settlement.text: Payment is made after the grounds are confirmed.

dispute.title: Dispute
dispute.text: Review is based on recorded data.

roles.title: Select your role in the deal
roles.text: First select the participant role. Then sign in using login, password, and organisation.

operator.title: Operator
operator.text: Deals, blockers, SLA, and control actions.

buyer.title: Buyer
buyer.text: Delivery, quality, documents, and payment risks.

seller.title: Seller
seller.text: Lot, trip, acceptance, and payment grounds.

logistics.title: Logistics
logistics.text: Trips, drivers, movement, and route deviations.

driver.title: Driver
driver.text: Route, trip checkpoints, photos, and offline evidence.

elevator.title: Elevator
elevator.text: Acceptance, storage, weight, and lot statuses.

lab.title: Laboratory
lab.text: Tests, quality indicators, and link to acceptance.

surveyor.title: Surveyor
surveyor.text: Inspection, fact recording, and independent evidence layer.

bank.title: Bank
bank.text: Grounds for financing and settlements based on confirmed events.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.text: Access, participant actions, and rule control.

arbitrator.title: Arbitrator
arbitrator.text: Dispute, discrepancies, evidence package, and fact-based decision.

executive.title: Executive
executive.text: Settlements, blockers, roles, disputes, and execution progress.

status.title: Status without guessing
status.text: One view of stages and participants.

trail.title: Legally relevant trail
trail.text: Events and documents are tied to deal execution.

docsControl.title: Document control
docsControl.text: Completeness, versions, deadlines, and owners are controlled.

loginLegacy.title: Sign in to the working platform
loginLegacy.lead: Enter corporate credentials to access the working circuit.
loginLegacy.error: Fill in the login, password, and organisation. The workspace opens only after the sign-in form.
